name: Apple Berry Salsa with Cinnamon Chips
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Granny Smith apples - Peel, core, and chop
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 475°F (245°C).
2. Lightly brush one side of the tortillas with water.
3. Sprinkle the brushed side with a mixture of cinnamon and sugar.
4. Cut each tortilla into 8 wedges.
5. Place the wedges on a stone or cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 5-7 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove to a cooling rack.
7. While the tortillas are baking, zest the orange (about 2 tablespoons) and juice it (about 1/4 cup).
8. In a bowl, combine the prepared fruit, orange zest, orange juice, brown sugar, and apple jelly.
9. Serve the fruit salsa with cinnamon chips.
Warning: Yield - 8 servings. Approx. 74 calories and less than 1 gram of fat per serving.
